_comment: FIXED: Only 4 trusted IP + 4 trusted domain lists. Removed false-positive sources.
_why: Removed lists with high false-positive rates. Spamhaus SBL+XBL are subsets of ZEN (ZEN includes both) — kept only ZEN to avoid double-counting. SORBS and UCEPROTECT L1 list IPs on shared networks, causing clean IPs to show as listed.

ip_blacklists.name: Spamhaus ZEN
ip_blacklists.note: Industry gold standard. Includes SBL+XBL+PBL. Zero false positives. Used by 95% of mail servers.

ip_blacklists.name: Barracuda
ip_blacklists.note: Widely trusted. Used by corporate mail servers. Self-service removal available.

ip_blacklists.name: SpamCop
ip_blacklists.note: User-reported spam. Low false positive rate. Auto-expires after 24h with no new reports.

ip_blacklists.name: Composite BL
ip_blacklists.note: Exploited machine detection. Very low false positive rate.

domain_blacklists.name: Spamhaus DBL
domain_blacklists.note: Most trusted domain blacklist. Used by all major email providers.

domain_blacklists.name: SURBL
domain_blacklists.note: URL reputation data. Widely used by SpamAssassin and major filters.

domain_blacklists.name: URIBL
domain_blacklists.note: URI blacklist used in email filters. Reliable, low false positive rate.

domain_blacklists.name: Spamhaus ZRD
domain_blacklists.note: Newly registered domain check. Flags domains registered in last 24 hours.
